# Copy Templates — @usa_first_ky

Replace bracketed text. **Always** review against [approval-workflow.md](approval-workflow.md).

---

## Pinned post (optional)

```
America First Kentucky (@usa_first_ky) is unofficial independent analysis & message support for KY-4, focused on Rep. Thomas Massie’s public record and constitutional issues.

Not the official campaign. Not the congressional office. Not the congressman speaking here.

Sources: [link to votes, Congress.gov, or official statements when possible]
```

---

## Single tweet — vote explainer

```
Context on [vote topic]:

Massie voted [Yea/Nay] on [short bill name]. [One sentence why it matters to KY-4 or the Constitution.]

Source: [link]
```

---

## Quote tweet — add context

```
Important context: [what the headline or OP leaves out]

Record: [vote / quote / public statement]

Link: [source]
```

---

## 5-part thread — issue explainer

```
1/ [Hook: what people are arguing about — neutral tone]

2/ [Fact: what the bill / action actually does — plain English]

3/ [Record: how Massie’s public statements or votes fit — with sources]

4/ [Tradeoff / tension: what honest critics say — no straw men]

5/ [Takeaway: what a voter can watch for next — not a prediction dressed as fact]
```

---

## Correction

```
Correction to our earlier post:

We said [wrong]. The accurate record is [right].

Source: [link]

Thank you to [who] for flagging.
```

---

## Reply — “is this official?”

```
This account is unofficial analysis only — not the campaign or congressional office. For official statements, see [Massie’s official account / press] and [link].
```

---

## Thread — mission pillar (war powers / corruption / cartel economy)

```
1/ Three things we’re watching for Kentucky voters: [pillar 1 in one line]

2/ [Pillar 2] — here’s what that means in practice…

3/ [Pillar 3] — why it matters to families…

4/ How we work: evidence first, unofficial always. Follow for vote context and sources.
```

---

## Weekly recap

```
This week on [theme]:
• [Post or vote 1 + link]
• [Post or vote 2 + link]
• [Post or vote 3 + link]

Unofficial analysis. Sources in each thread.
```
